title: gardenia costulata
intro: Gardenia costulata, also known as the Tahitian gardenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Gardenia costulata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions, among others. Herbal preparations of Gardenia costulata can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
